title: Survivor Skins
description: Adds variations for Alex and Steve textures themed to survival.
body:
A pack of variations for alex and steve themed to survival.
Use with random textures mod like optifine, etc. Skins taked from random open sources.
Dark version of alex and steve made by me. - steve variants: 25 - alex variants: 25 Default textures (alex.png and steve.png) also replaced.
